body:
## Summary
- Added an animated multi-section landing page for the card game.
- Updated the landing page hero with large card visuals, dark fantasy styling, and CTA buttons.
- Added skills / element showcase sections with autoplay-style transitions.
- Added PvE challenge banner using battlefield and boss/card assets.
- Updated Navbar styling to better match the landing page visual theme.
- Added new elemental icon assets for fire, water, and nature.
## Files changed
- `src/pages/HomePage.jsx`
- `src/components/layout/Navbar.jsx`
- `src/router/index.jsx`
- `public/images/icon-fire.png`
- `public/images/icon-nature.png`
- `public/images/icon-water.png`
## Test
- Ran frontend build successfully:
```bash
npm run build
- 新增了一个多屏滚动动画式 Landing Page，用于展示卡牌游戏首页。
首页 Hero 区域，加入大型卡牌视觉、暗黑奇幻风格背景和主要 CTA 按钮。
技能 / 元素展示区域，并加入自动播放式页面过渡动画。
PvE Challenge 展示横幅，使用 battlefield、boss 和卡牌资源增强游戏氛围。
调整 Navbar 样式，使其更符合 Landing Page 的整体视觉风格。
新增火、水、自然三个元素 icon 资源。
title: feat: add animated landing page /前端构建：npm run build
